# Wildflowers of the Midwest

Notes from a field guide borrowed over the winter. Kept here so the trail
species pages can point back to a book source.

Standouts to watch for along the marsh boardwalk:

- **Cardinal flower** — impossibly red, worth the mosquitoes.
- **Trout lily** — early, mottled leaves, gone by June.

If you reached this page by clicking a link, the spaced filename resolved
correctly.
